description: Style Note Give your wardrobe a fashion forward edge with these casual capris from allen solly. Their blended cotton composition keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a crisp shirt and wedge heels for a look that's effortless yet chic. Product Details Light blue capris, two curved patch pockets at front with top stitch, yoke with patch pockets at back, panels at front and back with top stitching, waist band with double loops, zippered fly with button and drawstring, upturned hem with buttoned tab, printed inner waistband, stretchable Material and Care 97% cotton and 3% spandex Machine wash Warm iron Do not bleach Size and Fit Loose fit The model (height 5'8" waist 28") is wearing a size 28
